Planning Guides

Renovation Planning Demo & Prep Scope
Early Access

Our Services

Remodeling-focused contract scopes delivered with professional sequencing, transparent proposals, and accountable execution.

Tile & Waterproofing Services

From shower assemblies to full interior tile packages, we provide TCNA-aware installation systems tailored to your home's needs.
  • ✓Tile layout planning and module optimization
  • ✓Shower waterproofing systems and flood-test prep
  • ✓Interior wall and floor tile installation
  • ✓Substrate flattening and crack-isolation prep
  • ✓Movement-joint and grout-joint detailing
Learn more about TCNA tile work

TCNA-Oriented Execution

We align tile and interior wet-area installations to current TCNA Handbook methods and accepted substrate/waterproofing practices.
NJ HIC# 13VH10808800
Fully insured and bonded
Comprehensive material warranties
Free estimates and consultations

Renovation & Remodeling

Kitchen remodels, bathroom updates, and interior refresh scopes that improve function and finish quality.

Home Renovation & Remodeling

We design and execute kitchen, bathroom, and whole-home renovations that enhance both functionality and value.
  • ✓Kitchen remodeling and redesign
  • ✓Bathroom renovation and modernization
  • ✓Whole-home renovations
  • ✓Custom cabinetry and built-ins
  • ✓Flooring installation and finishing details
Learn more about renovations

Selective Demolition & Project Prep

Before finish work begins, we manage controlled demolition and prep so installation phases start on stable, verified surfaces.
  • ✓Selective demolition and debris handling plans
  • ✓Substrate leveling and correction prep
  • ✓Moisture mitigation and waterproofing prep
  • ✓Layout control lines and material staging
  • ✓Jobsite protection and dust isolation planning
Learn more about demo and prep

Demo to Install Continuity

We sequence demolition, prep, and installation to reduce rework and keep remodel projects on schedule.

Finish Install Packages

Scope-built install packages for bathroom surfaces, flooring systems, and kitchen backsplash finish work.

Bathroom, Flooring & Backsplash Installs

We execute clean finish installations for the most requested interior remodel scopes in New Jersey homes.
  • ✓Bathroom tile and waterproofing systems
  • ✓Flooring replacement and transition detailing
  • ✓Kitchen backsplash layout and finish installation
  • ✓Trim-out punch lists and final detail passes
  • ✓Scope handoff walkthrough and close-out notes
Learn more about install planning

Ready to Get Started?

Request a free estimate and consultation for your remodeling scope.
